title: BEM-872 append curator sections
objective:
Append to governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM872_ROADMAP_AGREEMENT_RESPONSE.md: 
Evidence:
- governance/protocols/CURATOR_MEDIATED_INTERNAL_AUDIT_PROTOCOL.md
- governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM872_ROADMAP_AGREEMENT_REQUEST.md
- governance/audit/internal/results/BEM872_INTERNAL_CONTOUR_ROADMAP_RESULT.md
- Uploaded operator protocol and AI agents summary.
Roadmap:
- P0 Reliability: Claude runtime proof, workflow lint-gate, idempotency, checkpoint/resume, Runtime Registry v2, curator-mediated mailbox.
- P1 Role runtime: role contracts, role runners, board/director registry, product registry, direct GitHub API path with rights control.
- P2 Business pilots: one Director contour and one Worker contour execute a real business-domain pilot end-to-end using Business Model Canvas.
- P3 Scale: product repos, multi-client SLA, external storage only when file registry is limiting, interaction logging and evaluation dashboards.
Strategic variants:
- A Control-plane first: recommended baseline; lowest risk, slower visible business value.
- B Pilot-first with guardrails: recommended in parallel after P0 gates; fastest learning and validates Business Model Canvas.
- C Immediate high-autonomy multiagent system: not recommended before role contracts, identity, logs, checkpoints, and evaluation.
Recommendation:
- Adopt hybrid A+B: finish P0 reliability gates, then run one narrow business-domain pilot through Director/Worker contours with Business Model Canvas and curator-mediated mailbox. Defer C until evaluation and audit trail are mature.
No issue comments.
